sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109225" key="u(postimmi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποστιμμίζω</orth>, <sense id="n109225.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">paint with</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στίμμι,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:79" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.79</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
